title: Undo last commit but keep changes in staging area

content.problemStatement:
**In Your Workspace**
- Git is initialized, the first commit is done 
- Another commit is done by mistake  (i.e new line in `myFile.txt` with text **"Wrong Commit Done"**) 
- You still want to work on `myFile.txt`, so you want to undo the last commit but keep the changes to continue working.

If you check Git History, you'll see :


You want to Undo this wrong commit but keep changes in staging area

---

**To Undo last commit but keep changes**

Open your Terminal and Run :
```sss
git reset --soft HEAD~1
```
- last wrong commit removed
- But the changes in file are still staged 

You'll see :


---
